name: Mexican-Style Chili Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a non-stick pan with cooking spray.
2. Brown the beef cubes over moderate heat. Turn to brown evenly. Drain and discard any melted fat.
3. Stir in vinegar and onion. Cook and stir just until the onion begins to brown.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Lower the heat to simmering.
5. Cover and simmer for 1½ to 2 hours until the meat is very tender. Uncover and simmer until the sauce is thick. Skim fat, if any. If desired, serve with rice.
